appDescription.message: FitShield browser extension that helps you stay mindful of food delivery and fast-food ordering.

searchSitePlaceholder.message: Išči spletno mesto name or URL

timerDurationHint.message: Adjust the countdown before Nadaljuj appears.

siteOpenTimeHint.message: Choose how long spletna mesta stay open after the timer ends.

scheduleDefaultSummary.message: Blokiranje will follow your daily urnik when this is enabled.

popupBlockerSubtitle.message: Turn every blokiraj list on or off.

popupMetadataSubtitle.message: Blokiraj whole groups of spletna mesta by država or food kategorija.

popupCustomSubtitle.message: Dodaj your own spletna mesta and disable them individually.

popupScheduleSubtitle.message: Uporabiful for meal budgets, late-night ordering, or work hours.

statusInactive.message: Inactive. All spletna mesta are accessible.

statusAllDisabled.message: Blokator is on, but every individual spletno mesto is disabled. Odpri Nastavitve to turn some spletna mesta back on.

statusBypassActive.message: Temporary pass is active. Blokiranje resumes in $1.

statusOutsideSchedule.message: Blokator is armed, but outside urnikd hours. It will blokiraj from $1.

deliverySitesEnabledCount.message: $1 of $2 spletna mesta za dostavo enabled.

fastFoodSitesEnabledCount.message: $1 of $2 spletna mesta hitre hrane enabled.

warningIntro.message: Check in before you order. Hunger, convenience, stress, and habit can feel similar in the moment.

warningHintLocked.message: When the timer ends, you can continue to the spletno mesto for $1 $2.

warningUnlockHint.message: You can visit the spletno mesto now. The blokator will come back automatically after $1 $2.

warningErrorHint.message: Something went wrong while opening the spletno mesto. Please try again.

scheduledHoursHint.message: Blokiraj only during a daily time window.

customizeBlocklistIntro.message: Choose which built-in groups are active, turn individual spletna mesta on or off, and add your own domains.

customUrlsSettingsSubtitle.message: Dodaj your own domains and disable them individually.

fastFoodToggleTitle.message: Omogoči fast food spletno mesto blokirajing

customNormalizeHint.message: Entries are normalized to domains and blokirajed across all pages.

customEmptyDefault.message: Še ni blokiranih spletnih mest po meri. Zgoraj dodajte domeno, kot je example.com, da jo začnete blokirati.

customNoMatch.message: No URL-ji po meri match this search.

emptyDeliverySearch.message: No spletna mesta za dostavo match this search.

emptyFastFoodSearch.message: No spletna mesta hitre hrane match this search.

invalidUrlNotice.message: That URL does not look valid yet. Try a domain like example.com.

alreadyOnBlocklist.message: $1 is already on the blokirajlist, so it has been re-enabled.

addedToBlocklist.message: $1 was added to the custom blokirajlist.

removedFromBlocklist.message: $1 was removed from the custom blokirajlist.

metadataIntro.message: Blokiraj whole groups of spletna mesta by the država a brand operates in or the kind of food it serves. These blokirajs add to your existing spletno mesto and custom-URL blokirajs.

blockByCountryHint.message: Išči by država name or code, e.g. "United" or "US". Enabling a država blokirajs every brand active there.

countryQuickEmpty.message: Omogoči a država from search to pin it here.

blockByCategoryHint.message: Išči kategorije like burger, pizza, or coffee. Specialties are searchable too; the blokiraj applies by kategorija.

categoryQuickEmpty.message: Omogoči a kategorija from search to pin it here.

languageIntro.message: Choose the language FitShield uses for its own screens. This overrides your browser language for the extension only.

languageHint.message: Išči for a language and select it. Choose Sistem default to follow your browser.

noLanguagesMatch.message: Noben jezik se ne ujema z iskanjem.

systemThemeHint.message: Device preference or a fixed mode.

supportFooterText.message: If FitShield helped you avoid an unnecessary delivery order, optional support helps keep blokirajlists and docs moving.

backupIntro.message: Save your FitShield settings to a file, or restore them on another device. Everything stays on your device — nothing is uploaded.

importErrorNotice.message: That file isn't a valid FitShield backup.

protectionStatusIntro.message: Zasebna ocena v napravi o tem, kaj vam je FitShield pomagal preskočiti. To so ocene in nič se ne naloži.

avgMealCostHint.message: Za oceno prihranjenega denarja, ko izpustite naročilo. Shranjeno samo v vaši napravi.

resetIntro.message: Obnovi dele FitShielda na privzeto. Vsako dejanje najprej zahteva potrditev.

resetBlockingHint.message: Časovniki, urnik, stikala spletnih mest, URL-ji po meri ter blokade po državi/kategoriji.

resetPreferencesHint.message: Povprečna cena obroka, nastavitve kalorij in shranjena statistika.

factoryResetHint.message: Izbriši vse in vrni FitShield na stanje po namestitvi.

confirmResetBlocking.message: Ponastavim vse nastavitve blokiranja na privzeto? Tema, jezik in statistika ostanejo.

confirmResetAppearance.message: Ponastavim temo in videz na privzeti temni način?

confirmResetPreferences.message: Ponastavim nastavitve cene in kalorij ter statistiko prihrankov in prihranjenih kalorij?

confirmFactoryReset.message: Tovarniško ponastavim FitShield? To izbriše vse nastavitve, spletna mesta po meri in statistiko v tej napravi. Tega ni mogoče razveljaviti.

confirmRemoveCustomSite.message: Odstranim $1 z vašega seznama blokiranja po meri?

recipeChoiceNote.message: Dobra izbira — zabeleženo v statistiki. Oglejte si v Nastavitvah.

avgMealCaloriesHint.message: Za oceno prihranjenih kalorij, ko namesto tega izberete recept. Shranjeno samo v vaši napravi.

reorderCardLabel.message: Prerazporedi kartico: $1. Za premik uporabite puščične tipke.

welcomeSubtitle.message: Nekaj hitrih izbir in nared ste. Vse ostane v vaši napravi — nič se ne naloži.

welcomeLangBody.message: Nastavi jezik pojavnega okna, nastavitev in zaslona blokiranja FitShielda.

welcomeThemeBody.message: Barve lahko pozneje natančno prilagodite v Nastavitvah.

welcomeFastFoodBody.message: Doda zaslon premora na naročilnih straneh velikih verig hitre prehrane.

welcomeDeliveryBody.message: Doda zaslon premora na dostavnih platformah, kot sta DoorDash in Uber Eats.

welcomeImportBody.message: Prihajate iz druge naprave? Uvozite datoteko nastavitev FitShielda in prenesite vse. Sicer preprosto nadaljujte.

welcomeFeaturePauseBody.message: Ko zadenete blokirano mesto, teče kratko odštevanje, preden lahko nadaljujete — dovolj, da premislite o naročilu.

welcomeFeatureScheduleBody.message: Po želji blokirajte le ob določenih urah, kot so večeri ali delovni čas.

welcomeFeatureWhitelistBody.message: Izklopite katero koli mesto, dodajte svoje URL-je ali si dodelite začasno dovoljenje, ko ga res potrebujete.

welcomeFeatureRecipeBody.message: Zaslon blokiranja predlaga hiter vegetarijanski in mesni/beljakovinski recept glede na to, kaj ste blokirali.
